name: Salesforce Churn Risk Alert
description: Daily automated scan of Salesforce accounts to detect churn signals and post risk alerts to Slack.
longDescription: Runs every morning at 8 AM, queries all Customer accounts in Salesforce for inactivity, open cases, and missing renewal opportunities, scores each account 0–100, and posts a prioritized risk briefing to #cs-alerts for any account scoring above 60. CSMs see exactly which accounts need attention before the day starts.
